final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit DRAM cell with separate write and read operations. Data is written to the cell on the falling edge of the clock when write enable is low, and read from the cell on the rising edge of the clock when read enable is low.
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,      // write enable
    input wire re,      // read enable
    input wire [3:0] data_in, // 4-bit input data
    output reg [3:0] data_out  // 4-bit output data
);
    reg [3:0] storage; // 4-bit storage for the DRAM cell

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            storage <= data_in; // Store input data on write enable
        end
    end

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (re) begin
            data_out <= storage; // Output stored data on read enable
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit DRAM cell with separate write and read operations. Data is written to the cell on the falling edge of the clock when write enable is low, and read from the cell on the rising edge of the clock when read enable is low.
